tagline: Files on Drive, one prompt away.
longDescription:
The single skill that powers `destinclaude-drive`'s Google Drive integration. Wraps `rclone` with a strict rule: every Drive operation goes through the configured `gdrive:` remote — never browser automation, never the web UI, never another path. List, search, upload, download, copy, move, delete, create folders, all in conversation: "show me my Drive", "download the latest report to Desktop", "move these into a 2026-Taxes folder".

First-run setup walks you through `rclone config` to authorize Drive once. Install this skill if you want raw Drive access without the rest of `destinclaude-drive`'s polish, or install `destinclaude-drive` for the full bundle including helper commands and integration with the broader DestinClaude toolkit.
